title: CLAUDE.md
summary: Repository-wide operational guidance for Claude Code covering project overview, tech stack, build commands, architecture, conventions, guardrails, and an append-only Living Ledger of dated rules.
notes: Hybrid document: primary form is instructional guidance for an AI coding assistant (DOC), but the 'Living Ledger' section (~30 dated entries from 2026-04-17 onward) functions as an append-only log of locked architectural decisions, each with rationale, fix, and 'New rules' clauses — effectively ADRs embedded inline. Classified as DOC because (a) the document's stated purpose is to 'provide guidance to Claude Code', (b) it lacks the per-entry frontmatter, single-decision focus, and Context/Decision/Consequences template of canonical ADRs, and (c) it bundles conventions, build commands, and architecture overview alongside the ledger. Synthesizer should consider extracting individual Living Ledger entries as ADR-equivalent locked rules during downstream processing; many entries explicitly say 'New rule:' and bind future behavior (e.g., do-not-replace-Snapshot-Date cutoff, retire RATE_CUTOFF_DATE at workflow layer, parallelize per-row I/O, SQLSTATE classification, source-WR collision quarantine). The 'Architecture Decisions' top-section is also decision-flavored but high-level.
